dashboard.label: Heart Rate
dashboard.description: Intraday HR, resting HR trend, BPM distribution
dashboard.definition: {"title":"Heart Rate","description":"Intraday HR, resting HR trend, BPM distribution","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-7d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"}},"dataSources":{"ds_resting_hr":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | stats min(bpm) as resting_hr | table resting_hr","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}}},"ds_hr_stats":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | stats avg(bpm) as avg_hr, max(bpm) as max_hr, min(bpm) as min_hr | eval avg_hr=round(avg_hr,0) | table avg_hr, max_hr, min_hr"}},"ds_intraday":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | table _time, bpm | sort _time"}},"ds_resting_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | eval day=strftime(_time,\"%Y-%m-%d\") | stats min(bpm) as \"Resting HR\" by day | sort day"}},"ds_distribution":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | eval bpm_bucket=tostring(floor(bpm/5)*5).\"-\".tostring(floor(bpm/5)*5+4) | stats count by bpm_bucket | sort bpm_bucket"}},"ds_source_pie":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | stats count by source | sort -count"}}},"visualizations":{"resting_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resting_hr"},"options":{"majorField":"resting_hr","majorColor":"#E8503A","majorFontSize":72,"label":"Resting HR","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('resting_hr')"},"title":"Resting Heart Rate"},"avg_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hr_stats"},"options":{"majorField":"avg_hr","majorColor":"#E8503A","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Avg BPM","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('avg_hr')"},"title":"Average BPM"},"min_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hr_stats"},"options":{"majorField":"min_hr","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Min BPM","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('min_hr')"},"title":"Minimum BPM"},"max_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hr_stats"},"options":{"majorField":"max_hr","majorColor":"#F4A422","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Max BPM","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('max_hr')"},"title":"Maximum BPM"},"intraday_line":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Intraday Heart Rate","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_intraday"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#E8503A"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","lineWidth":1.5,"showDots":false,"yAxisTitle":"BPM","xAxisTitle":"Time"}},"resting_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Resting HR Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resting_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"day","seriesColors":["#E8503A"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisTitle":"Resting BPM","xAxisTitle":"Date"}},"distribution_bar":{"type":"splunk.column","title":"BPM Distribution","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_distribution"},"options":{"xAxisField":"bpm_bucket","seriesColors":["#E8503A"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","yAxisTitle":"Sample Count","xAxisTitle":"BPM Range"}},"source_pie":{"type":"splunk.pie","title":"HR Source Breakdown","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_source_pie"},"options":{"seriesColors":["#E8503A","#4263B8","#F4A422","#4CAF50","#A78BFA"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"right"}}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"New tab"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","structure":[{"item":"resting_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":280,"h":200}},{"item":"avg_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":320,"y":20,"w":215,"h":200}},{"item":"min_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":555,"y":20,"w":215,"h":200}},{"item":"max_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":790,"y":20,"w":215,"h":200}},{"item":"intraday_line","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":240,"w":1400,"h":280}},{"item":"resting_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":540,"w":680,"h":280}},{"item":"distribution_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":720,"y":540,"w":420,"h":280}},{"item":"source_pie","type":"block","position":{"x":1160,"y":540,"w":260,"h":280}}],"options":{"width":1440,"height":850,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}}}}}}
